subcodes.first_line: Mine eyes are cheered, O my God, when I contemplate the tribulations that descend upon me from the heaven of Thy decree
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی قرت عین البهاء بالنظر الی افق البلا الذی اتی من سماء قضائک و اخذه من
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love of God, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ
